name: Israeli Fondue
recipeIngredient: 5 Tablespoons Smetana or thick sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the flesh from the avocados and mash it in a bowl with lemon juice until smooth.
2. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with the cut clove of garlic.
3. Pour in the white wine and heat until bubbling.
4. Over a gentle heat, stir in the cheese and cook until melted. Stir frequently.
5. In a small bowl, blend the cornflour smoothly with smetana or sour cream.
6. Add the blended mixture to the cheese sauce with the mashed avocados.
7. Continue cooking for 4-5 minutes until thick and smooth, stirring frequently.
8. Serve with cubes of sesame-coated bread and cubes of green and red peppers.
(Serves 4-6)
